hero.subtitle: PRICING PLANS
hero.title: Choose the Right Plan for Your Business
hero.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. All plans include our core AI-powered features to help you grow.

faqs.question: Can I change my plan later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise customers.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What happens after my trial ends?
faqs.answer: After your trial ends, you can choose to subscribe to any of our plans or your account will be automatically downgraded to our limited free tier.

cta.title: Still Have Questions?
cta.description: Our team is here to help you find the perfect plan for your business needs.
